channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLmoneyAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLmoneyAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: High-Fee Private Funds May Soon Have Access to 401(k) Accounts
item.description: The acting labor secretary under the Trump administration has signaled support for opening retirement accounts to alternative investments, raising concerns among consumer advocates.

item.title: Worker Weighs Leaving $150,000 Nonprofit Role for $215,000 Data Analytics Position
item.description: A professional considering a career change from a stable nonprofit job to a higher-paying data analytics role cites limited advancement prospects as a key factor.

item.title: AMD Stock Rallies Toward Significant Milestone, Analysts Say
item.description: Morgan Stanley analysts suggest AMD is positioned to outpace Intel in benefiting from rising server CPU demand, contributing to strong share price momentum.

item.title: Parent in 40s With $330,000 Seeks Strategy to Fund Child's Lifelong Care
item.description: A parent of a child requiring lifelong support is asking how to manage a $330,000 portfolio to sustain financial security across two generations.

item.title: DOJ Drops Federal Reserve Probe, Clearing Path for Warsh Nomination
item.description: The Trump administration's Justice Department announced it is stepping back from a dispute over Federal Reserve leadership, potentially clearing the way for Kevin Warsh's confirmation.
